CREATE TABLE kv (v1 Int32, v2 String, v3 Float64, v4 Tuple(Int32, String), v5 Tuple(Int32, Int32), v6 Tuple(Int32, String, Float64));
SELECT untuple((* EXCEPT (v2, v3),)) FROM kv;
SELECT v1, untuple(v4) FROM kv WHERE v1 >= 1;
SELECT v1, untuple(v5) FROM (SELECT v5 FROM kv WHERE v2 LIKE 'string%') AS subquery;
SELECT untuple(v4) FROM kv WHERE v6.1 > 5;
SELECT SUM(untuple(v5).1) FROM kv GROUP BY untuple(v4).1;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT untuple(v6) FROM kv JOIN kv AS kv2 ON kv.v1 = kv2.v1) AS joined;
SELECT untuple(v4), untuple(v5) FROM kv WHERE v3 < 2.0;
